message: MULTI-ROLE & MULTI-LOCATION SYSTEM UPGRADE
details: Enhanced Multi-Location Access, supporting management of assets across multiple branches concurrently.
Introduced Multi-Role support, enabling users to hold multiple designations simultaneously (e.g., Studio Admin & Client Admin).
Improved data filtering in Dashboard, Asset Catalog, and Room Management based on authorized locations.
Refined system security and role normalization for enhanced application stability.
Updated user interface to display multiple role badges across authorized views.
Resolved data display inconsistencies where branch assets were not correctly filtered by specific user permissions.
